headline: Removed the oversized blank gaps introduced by the v213 mobile safe-area patch.
focus: Fix mobile whitespace regression while keeping the bottom dock usable on iPhone Safari.
notes: Removed giant bottom spacing from generic article:last-of-type mobile rules.
Moved safe-area breathing room back to the page level instead of inner cards.
Kept bottom dock stability while trimming excess internal whitespace.
Included a tiny homepage Korean copy cleanup.
